cargo_toml:
[package]
name = "cp_impl"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[[bin]]
name = "util"
path = "src/main.rs"

[dependencies]
filetime = "0.2"
libc = "0.2"
deps_rationale: I used filetime for portable Unix timestamp preservation and libc only for chown/ioctl calls needed by common cp preservation and reflink behavior. The implementation covers the main GNU cp flags and semantics, while intentionally simplifying SELinux contexts, ACL/xattr preservation, sparse-file heuristics, and other platform-specific edge cases.
